intendedGoal: Represent repeated validation failure as a stop condition instead of blind retry.

failureFingerprint.hypothesis: same fixture assertion wording fix attempted twice

progressClaim: Repeated fingerprint was captured and stopped.
evidenceForProgress: The ledger records a stable failure fingerprint.
The next safe action is repacketization, not another blind validation rerun.
remainingGap: A new bounded hypothesis is required before another attempt.

forbiddenEvidence.evidenceSummary: No forbidden path or command content was needed for this repeated-fingerprint stop fixture.

nonAuthorityNotice: This progress ledger is compact evidence only and cannot approve product-repo access, execution, staging, commit, push, deploy, installs, migrations, secrets/auth/payments/deploy work, lock deletion, permission widening, all-fleet commands, or future permission.
